title: armeria × carnotana
intro: Armeria × carnotana, also known as the Carnation Thrift or Sea Thrift, is a hybrid plant species in the genus Armeria, characterized by its pink or white flowers and silvery-green foliage. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to its high concentration of tannins and essential oils. The health benefits of Armeria × carnotana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Armeria × carnotana is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often using the plant's dried flowers and leaves to harness its medicinal properties.
